bottlenecks.name: Unanswered inbound contacts
bottlenecks.description: Phones never answered, emails ignored, voicemails unreturned. First point of contact fails entirely.
bottlenecks.solution: Capture every inbound enquiry 24/7, answer FAQs, route to the right person, confirm receipt instantly.

bottlenecks.name: Mid-treatment communication gap
bottlenecks.description: Patients in active treatment cycles cannot get clarity on next steps, medication, or results. Staff flooded with reactive queries.
bottlenecks.solution: Proactive milestone-triggered updates. Patient asks "what do I do next?" — chatbot answers from protocol without involving a nurse.

bottlenecks.name: Appointment booking errors
bottlenecks.description: Appointments booked on wrong dates, cancelled without notice, admin records incorrect. Patients arrive to find no record of them.
bottlenecks.solution: Automated booking confirmation, reminders, structured rescheduling. Patient self-serves; errors caught before they happen.

bottlenecks.name: Test results not delivered
bottlenecks.description: Patients waiting weeks for results with no proactive notification. Generates high-volume inbound chasing calls.
bottlenecks.solution: Automated result-ready notification with next steps. Eliminates the chase entirely.

bottlenecks.name: Financial transparency at enquiry stage
bottlenecks.description: Patients quoted one price, billed another. Hidden add-ons not disclosed. Generates disputes and 1-star reviews.
bottlenecks.solution: Upfront cost breakdown in the chatbot enquiry flow. Quotes the likely range, explains add-ons, sets expectations before booking.

bottlenecks.name: Post-treatment follow-up absent
bottlenecks.description: After procedures, patients hear nothing. No aftercare instructions, no check-in, no results follow-up.
bottlenecks.solution: Automated post-procedure workflow: aftercare instructions day 1, check-in day 3, results notification when ready.

not_solvable.name: Treatment Quality
not_solvable.reason: Clinical issue — requires better protocols and clinician training

not_solvable.name: Staff Attitude
not_solvable.reason: Management / HR issue — no chatbot can fix a dismissive consultant

not_solvable.name: Doctor / Consultant
not_solvable.reason: Clinical quality — outside scope of automation
